text: {"matches":[{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 0 reports a single trial result, while claim 1 reports the systematic review’s overall conclusion, making claim 0 a specific instance of claim 1."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":2,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 2 describes which primary study the review included, whereas claim 1 reports the review’s overall finding; they address different aspects of the review."},{"type":"contradicts","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 3 treats the Smith trial and the Jones review as independent confirmations, but claim 2 states the review’s evidence consists solely of that trial, so they cannot both be true."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 3 concerns how evidence was counted, while claim 1 concerns the effect estimate; they refer to different scopes."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":3,"rationale":"Claim 0 reports the trial outcome, whereas claim 3 discusses evidence synthesis; they are about different aspects of the research."}]}
